theme_notes: Today's lines draw from the Iran-US standoff over the Strait of Hormuz (oil spiking, global food emergency), PSG's wild 5-4 Champions League semifinal over Bayern Munich, King Charles III's state visit to Washington, the US travel ban hitting 39 countries, surging gas prices at a 4-year high, and Harry Styles's engagement to Zoë Kravitz.
settled: Balanced. Even US-Iran talks wish they were this clean.
Zero. King Charles crossed the Atlantic and somehow this is still your best day.
PSG 5, Bayern 4, you: settled. Wildest Tuesday all around.
youOwe: Less than a gallon of gas. Which is already highway robbery. This is somehow worse.
Iran surrendered the Strait of Hormuz. You're holding onto $35.
Harry Styles got engaged. You can't even commit to a bank transfer.
King Charles crossed the Atlantic for this state visit. You can't cross three digits.
SGA swept the Suns in four. You've been sitting on this for longer.
Gas is $4.17 a gallon and climbing. Your credibility is moving the opposite direction.
PSG scored 5 against Bayern and still looked stressed. Study that energy.
The US is blockading Iranian ports. You're blockading your own banking app.
Oil prices spiked from the Iran war. So did your partner's blood pressure.
39 countries on the travel ban. Your partner's adding a 40th.
Trump's in the Situation Room over Iran. You should also be very concerned right now.
Harry proposed to Zoë Kravitz. Your partner is considering a very different proposal.
The Thunder swept three consecutive first rounds. You've swept zero obligations.
Oil hit a 4-year high. Your debt-to-dignity ratio is approaching similar territory.
King Charles is doing a state visit. This debt is doing a permanent residency.
Iran's offering up a shipping lane. You're not offering anything.
The IMF downgraded global GDP. Also your standing in this household.
Five figures. PSG put 5 past Bayern. You can't put one payment through.
theyOwe: Less than a gallon of gas. At $4.17, that's still a principle. Collect it.
Zoë Kravitz just said yes to Harry. Your partner can say yes to repaying you.
SGA dropped 26 in the clincher. They've dropped $0 of repayment. Fix that.
King Charles came to Washington. Your partner can come to the point.
Gas hits a 4-year high. So does your disappointment in this person.
PSG needed 5 goals to win. You just need one Venmo.
Iran is stalling nuclear talks. Your partner is stalling repayment. Diplomacy is broken.
The Timberwolves lead their series 3-1. So does your case for getting paid back.
Three figures. The UN declared a food emergency. Consider declaring your own.
Harry got engaged. Your partner got comfortable not paying you. Very different energy.
Fuel prices at a 4-year high and climbing. Your patience has also peaked.
Iran offered the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner offered nothing. Embarrassing for them.
King Charles got a state banquet. You got an IOU. Demand an upgrade.
Anthony Edwards leads 3-1 despite injuries. Your partner leads in not paying you.
The Strait of Hormuz just changed hands. So should this money. Immediately.
PSG 5, Bayern 4. You 0, them five grand. Something has gone catastrophically wrong.
